title: How to add two progress tracking column percentage?
excerpt: I have a board monitoring status percentage of an item. I want to add a formula column wherein i want to add two Progress tracking column (percentage) but i received error stating : “Unsupported format: adding battery pe…

posts.author: kedalonzo (Ked Alonzo)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board monitoring status percentage of an item. I want to add a formula column wherein i want to add two Progress tracking column (percentage) but i received error stating : “Unsupported format: adding battery percentage”. Anyone have a workaround or solution into this?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Cool use of the columns. This might be a feature request @kedalonzo
